name: afo-agent-boot-gateway-mcp
description: Compositor: assembles startup context packets for AFO agents from boot commands, bulletins, handoffs, and tool belts.

bindings.name: GATEWAY_GITHUB_TOKEN
bindings.purpose: GitHub reads: modes.json, bulletins, handoffs, specs

tools.name: boot_gateway_status
tools.description: Gateway health, modes count, binding status.

tools.name: list_boot_modes
tools.description: All available boot modes from modes.json.

tools.name: boot_agent
tools.description: Core tool. Mode → boot command → full startup context packet.

tools.name: load_project_context
tools.description: Lists spec files for a project from agent-bridge.

tools.name: load_recent_handoffs
tools.description: Recent handoffs from agent-bridge, filterable by agent.

tools.name: load_tool_belt
tools.description: Tool names and descriptions for a named belt.

tools.name: compose_startup_context
tools.description: Fan-out compositor with explicit boot_command input.
